name: prop_77
statement:
theorem prop_77 (x: Nat) (xs: List Nat) :
  (sorted xs → sorted (insort x xs)) :=

tactic_nodes.tactic_text:
induction xs with
| nil => _*_
| cons y ys ih => _*_

input_obligation.goal: sorted xs = true → sorted (insort x xs) = true

hypotheses.name: ih
